title: Saiyo Saiyo Song Lyrics Bagavathi
stanzas:
Saiyo Saiyo Song Lyrics Bagavathi
#Deva

Saiyo saiyo Saiyo
poo poothaal adi
un vaasam

haiyo haiyo haiyo
mazhai peithaal
adi un vaasam

kadal kaattril undhan
vaasam
uyir moochil undhan
vaasam

Saiyo saiyo Saiyo
poo poothaal adi
un vaasam

haiyo haiyo haiyo
mazhai peithaal
adi un vaasam

rendu spoon punnagai
rendu spoon vanmurai
kannodu kalandhadhu
yaeno ?

rendu spoon muthangal
rendu spoon vetkangal
kannathil koduthathu
yaeno ?

un srippu ellaam
anbae haikoo kavadhaiyadi
adhai padithu paarhtaen
ayyo puriyave illaiyadi

en vizhi vilakkai
nee urasiyadhum
kadhal bootham
ondru kudhikkum

oru karuppu vellai
pookkal undaa kaettaen
adhai undhan kannil
kandaen kandaen.

Saiyo saiyo Saiyo
poo poothaal ada
un vaasam

haiyo haiyo haiyo
mazhai peithaal
ada un vaasam

Azhagaanaa idhalaal
adikkadi adikkadi
ayyo enbadhai rasithaen.

chudithaaril theriyaamal
siru viral pattaaalum
anbae nee sorry enbaai
rasithaen

un niyabagathaal
varugira thummalai
rasithaen.

en peyarai solli
ne seyyum archanai
rasithaen.

rail nilayathile
ennai vali anuppi
jannal oram azhudhaai
rasithaene..

mazhai maadhathile
kudai maraithuvitu
endhan kudaikul vandhaai
rasithaen.

Saiyo saiyo Saiyo
poo poothaal adi
un vaasam

haiyo haiyo haiyo
mazhai peithaal
adi un vaasam

kadal kaattril undhan
vaasam
uyir moochil undhan
vaasam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Saiyo Saiyo, the characters express their deep affection and longing for each other, encapsulating the romantic essence of the film Bagavathi. The song's lyrics evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The melodious collaboration between Sadhana Sargam and Timmy, under Deva's musical direction, creates an uplifting atmosphere. Overall, it conveys the beauty of love and the emotions that come with it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saiyo Saiyo from Bagavathi is a delightful duet that captures the essence of romance and joy. With the enchanting voices of Sadhana Sargam and Timmy, paired with Deva's captivating music, this song is sure to resonate with lovers everywhere. Experience the magic of this melodious track that beautifully expresses the feelings of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: When flowers bloom, that's your presence.
Oh no, when it rains, that's your presence.
In the sea breeze, your presence is life; in the breath, your presence is there.
When flowers bloom, that's your presence.
Oh no, when it rains, that's your presence.
Why do two smiles come together with two eyes?
Why do two pearls and two desires come together in the eyes?
I see all your beauty, but I can't understand it, oh no.
Your eyes are like lamps, and they shine with love.
I asked if there are black and white flowers, and I saw them in your eyes.
When flowers bloom, that's your presence.
Oh no, when it rains, that's your presence.
With this beauty, I feel like saying oh no.
Even if you don't know, if you touch with your little fingers, you say sorry, and I feel it.
I feel the storm that comes with your thoughts.
I feel the worship that you do by saying my name.
In the railway station, I was sent away, and I cried looking out the window.
In the rainy season, hiding under an umbrella, you came to my house.
When flowers bloom, that's your presence.
Oh no, when it rains, that's your presence.
In the sea breeze, your presence is life; in the breath, your presence is there.
